summary: ANDROID 🟥 | CCL | CCL during call is blinking for blocking settings
scenario: CCL (Call Control Layer) settings blink instead of being locked during an active call
description_clean: During a call, the CCL (Call Control Layer) settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked as expected. Steps: 1. Go to CCL and start a call. 2. Verify CCL settings are locked. Observed: CCL settings are blinking. Expected: CCL settings are locked.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings.
4. Initiate a call from the Android device (e.g., dial a number or receive an incoming call).
5. During the active call, observe the Call Control Layer (CCL) settings within Audio Settings.
expected: CCL settings are locked/blocked and not interactive during an active call.
actual: CCL settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked during an active call.
